name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Squirrel Lolbin
notes:
This Building Block detects Possible Squirrel Packages Manager as Lolbin.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Karneades / Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Squirrel Lolbin
SIGMA Description: Detects Possible Squirrel Packages Manager as Lolbin


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Squirrel Lolbin on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of update.exe

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--processstart%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--processstartandwait%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--createshortcut%')) AQL filter query

when the event matches (((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\users\%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\discord\update.exe%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --processstart%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%discord.exe%') or ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\users\%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\githubdesktop\update.exe%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%githubdesktop.exe%') and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--createshortcut%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--processstartandwait%')) or ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\users\%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\teams\update.exe%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%teams.exe%') and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--processstart%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--createshortcut%')))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Squirrel Lolbin on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of update.exe

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--processstart%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--processstartandwait%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--createshortcut%')) AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches (((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\users\%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\discord\update.exe%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --processstart%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%discord.exe%') or ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\users\%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\githubdesktop\update.exe%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%githubdesktop.exe%') and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--createshortcut%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--processstartandwait%')) or ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\users\%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\teams\update.exe%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%teams.exe%') and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--processstart%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--createshortcut%')))) AQL filter query
